## Anti-Shell Self-Check

Before submitting, run the protocol's own self-check:

- [ ] **Survival Condition**: Every change has a clear "Alive if / Dead if" pair.
- [ ] **Jargon-Free**: The output contains no phrases that consume space without creating knowledge.
- [ ] **Uncertainty Ratio**: If this is a significant change, Yellow + Red < 30% is a red flag.
- [ ] **Honesty**: There is an explicit acknowledgment of what this PR does NOT address.
- [ ] **Actionability**: The first concrete step after merge is stated below.

## First Step After Merge

<!-- What is the very first thing someone should do after this PR is merged? -->

## Visual Verification (if applicable)

- [ ] Site renders correctly at 320px, 768px, and 1200px widths.
- [ ] No emoji or decorative elements were introduced.
- [ ] All text is in Helvetica Neue / Helvetica / Arial (no new fonts).
